name: Connection Pool Exhaustion
description: user-service returns 503 due to DB connection pool being exhausted from leaked connections
alert_message: user-service is returning 503 Service Unavailable errors. Connection pool appears exhausted.
expected_root_cause: Database connection pool leak in user-service. Connections are acquired but not released on 15% of requests, leading to pool exhaustion.
expected_actions: Fix connection release logic in error paths
